content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Jun 6, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on June 6 focused on stabilizing the cloud infrastructure, refining the Steward authentication flow, and modularizing the codebase. Key achievements include resolving mobile onboarding issues, unifying credit ledgers for monetized apps, and decomposing the `plugin-lifeops` monolith into specialized, domain-focused plugins to improve maintainability and performance.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Cloud Authentication & Infrastructure Stability**
*   Resolved mobile and CLI cloud onboarding by pinning Steward OAuth redirect URIs and utilizing session storage for return targets ([#8278](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8278), [#8279](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8279)).
*   Fixed Steward cookie refresh and SPA hydration to prevent session bouncing ([#8280](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8280), [#8282](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8282)).
*   Updated Steward SDK to v0.10.1 to resolve passkey challenge issues and handle MFA-required auth results ([#8267](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8267), [#8271](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8271)).
*   Fixed upstream Steward auth calls and cloud-plugin type errors ([#8287](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8287), [#8288](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8288)).

**Architecture & Plugin Refactoring**
*   Decomposed the `plugin-lifeops` monolith into a slim `plugin-personal-assistant` orchestrator and six focused domain plugins ([#8277](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8277)).
*   Added third-party registry support for `@madeonsol/plugin-madeonsol` ([#8260](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8260)).
*   Cleaned up CI workflows by removing broken wildcard route verification ([#8283](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8283)).

**Testing & Quality Assurance**
*   Implemented end-to-end smoke tests for the monetized-app loop using a `cloud:mock` stack ([#8249](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8249)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   **Cloud & Auth:** [#8281](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8281) (Harden login callback), [#8274](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8274) (Remove anonymous guest sessions), [#8273](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8273) (Idempotent container billing), [#8272](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8272) (Idempotent domain purchase), [#8265](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8265) (Clarify credit error messaging).
*   **Orchestrator & UI:** [#8286](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8286) (Session timeout handling), [#8285](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8285) (Windows env forwarding), [#8276](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8276) (Improve views/apps screen), [#8275](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8275) (Child-to-parent skill broker).
*   **Dependencies:** [#8284](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8284) (Bump aiohttp).

## CLOSED ISSUES

**Prompt Suggestions & Context Awareness**
*   [#8225](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8225): Implemented scope-aware prompt suggestions on the `POST /api/suggestions` endpoint, featuring a hybrid heuristic/model-based tiering system to ensure suggestions are always available.

**Credit Ledger Unification**
*   [#8253](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8253): Resolved the "stranded credits" issue by unifying app-credit purchases into the primary organization ledger, ensuring purchased credits are usable for inference across all apps.

## NEW ISSUES
*   None.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   None.
